case_title: ARDIS ENFIAJIAN VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENFIAJIAN, ARDIS AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENFIAJIAN, ARDIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $21,487.50 PRINCIPAL, $117.74 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,905.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ENFIAJIAN, ARDIS
